content.text:
<analysis>
a. Summarize the event type and context:
This is a pull request review trigger. The PR adds comprehensive PP2A subunit gene annotations and research data for four human genes (PPP2CA, PPP2CB, PPP2R1A, PPP2R1B). The PR contains ~30k line additions including AI-reviewed GO annotations, UniProt data, research documents, and publication references.

b. Determine if this is a request for code review feedback or for implementation:
This is explicitly a code review request. The direct prompt asks me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. List key information from the provided data:
- PR adds 4 gene annotation sets with comprehensive data
- 100 files changed with substantial additions (29,886 lines added)
- Includes YAML annotation files, research notes, publications, and InterPro data
- One review comment already identifies an error in PPP2R1B notes (incorrect protein identity)
- Repository uses LinkML schema validation and has specific validation commands

d. Outline the main tasks and potential challenges:
- Review the gene annotation YAML files for schema compliance and accuracy
- Check the research notes and publication data for correctness
- Validate against the project's specific guidelines in CLAUDE.md
- Run validation commands if possible
- Address the existing review comment about the PPP2R1B error

e. Propose a high-level plan:
- Read CLAUDE.md to understand project guidelines
- Review key annotation files for compliance with schema and best practices
- Check for the specific error mentioned in the review comment
- Run validation commands to check for schema compliance
- Provide comprehensive feedback on data quality, structure, and adherence to guidelines

f. Limitations:
I may not be able to run all validation tools if they require specific dependencies or permissions, but I can still provide thorough manual review based on the schema and guidelines.
</analysis>

I'll review this PR comprehensively, focusing on the gene annotation quality, schema compliance, and adherence to project guidelines.

input.body: ### PR Review: PP2A Subunit Gene Annotations Reviewing this comprehensive addition of PP2A gene annotation data. This appears to be a substantial contribution adding curated data for four key PP2A subunit genes. #### Review Checklist: - [ ] Read project guidelines and schema requirements - [ ] Review gene annotation YAML files for schema compliance - [ ] Check research notes and publication data quality - [ ] Address existing review comment about PPP2R1B error - [ ] Run validation commands where possible - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback on data quality and structure --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/22823659999)

content.text: Let me start by reading the project guidelines and schema:
